message:
chore(beads): refine br-2bbt TUI V2 beads (pass 5 of 5)

Pass 5 fixes (7 items):
- br-2bbt.12: remove stale Ctrl+K reference (dropped in pass 3), fix j->J for JSON toggle, add all missing keybindings
- br-2bbt.4.1: fix title from ftui_extras to ftui_widgets Sparkline (preferred path)
- br-2bbt.16: change Timeline view toggle from v to V (capital) to avoid conflict with visual selection mode (br-2bbt.10)
- br-2bbt.10: add v vs V keybinding clarity note for Timeline screen
- br-2bbt.19.1: add file location guidance (tui_widgets.rs for reusability)
- br-2bbt.2.3: add note about m key trapping when toast stack is focused
- br-2bbt.9: add Ctrl+S XOFF safety note and expanded test criteria
- br-2bbt.20: fix v->V for Timeline view toggle in docs phase 2
- br-2bbt.3.1: define associated type instead of vague RowData, add file locations

Final state: 49 beads, 20 tracks, 0 cycles, 0 priority misalignments, 16 ready for parallel work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
